event.message: Internal server error with missing stacktrace

mockCodexResult.summary: The stacktrace is insufficient for an automated PR.
mockCodexResult.rootCause: The available Sentry event lacks enough in-app evidence.
evidence: Only generic server error is present
mockCodexResult.discordReply: 근거가 부족해 자동 PR 대신 조사 이슈를 등록합니다.

githubIssue.title: Investigate ambiguous Sentry server error
githubIssue.body: The Sentry event is missing enough stacktrace data for an automated fix. Capture more context and inspect related logs.
